steps.title: Spot the general claim followed by its specific case
steps.content: The narrator opens with a general observation: each crew member believes he did all the work. “Harris's notion was” immediately introduces Harris's particular version of this exact belief.

steps.title: Verify that the exemplification matches the correct choice
steps.content: The correct answer correctly names the function: offering Harris's specific belief as a concrete example of the trend the narrator described. The other choices misidentify it by ascribing surprise, intent, or confusion of viewpoint instead. That is the correct answer.
